entries.note: V61-B reuses the shipped V61-A communication surfaces by default.
V61-B makes resident bridge-office binding explicit, typed, and replayable.
V61-B makes message rewitness explicit, typed, and fail-closed.
V61-B requires an explicit witness basis or certificate for positive rewitness.
V61-B keeps rewitness posture non-mutating for charter, residual, loop-state, and continuation outputs.
V61-B keeps evidence from the selected resident send seam non-generalizing by default.
